'''kakoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:meak|meak]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-k-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meak|meak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kakoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kækereth|kækereth]] || [[word:kækerej|kækerej]] || [[word:kækeresh|kækeresh]] || [[word:kækere|kækere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kakokoroth|kakokoroth]] || [[word:kakokoroj|kakokoroj]] || [[word:kakokorosh|kakokorosh]] || [[word:kakokoro|kakokoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kakoroth|kakoroth]] || [[word:kakoroj|kakoroj]] || [[word:kakorosh|kakorosh]] || [[word:kakoro|kakoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kakofroth|kakofroth]] || [[word:kakofroj|kakofroj]] || [[word:kakofrosh|kakofrosh]] || [[word:kakofrof|kakofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kakorotho|kakorotho]] || [[word:kakorojo|kakorojo]] || [[word:kakorosho|kakorosho]] || [[word:kakoroko|kakoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kakoroth|kakoroth]] || [[word:kakoroj|kakoroj]] || [[word:kakorosh|kakorosh]] || [[word:kakoro|kakoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kakorothol|kakorothol]] || [[word:kakorojol|kakorojol]] || [[word:kakoroshol|kakoroshol]] || [[word:kakorokol|kakorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kakorothotho|kakorothotho]] || [[word:kakorojojo|kakorojojo]] || [[word:kakoroshosho|kakoroshosho]] || [[word:kakoroko|kakoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kakorothon|kakorothon]] || [[word:kakorojon|kakorojon]] || [[word:kakoroshon|kakoroshon]] || [[word:kakorokon|kakorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kakorothoro|kakorothoro]] || [[word:kakorojoro|kakorojoro]] || [[word:kakoroshoro|kakoroshoro]] || [[word:kakorokoro|kakorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
